<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add attachment in Jira issue"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/jira/addIssueAttachment/{issueId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to add attachment in the issue in Jira

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"issueId","in":"path","description":"Issue id for which attachment needs to be added for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"file","description":"Attachment which needs to be added in Jira issue"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Attachment which needs to be added in Jira issue","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"file":{"type":"string","format":"binary"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns a Success code if the operation was successful","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR if there was some other error that did not allow the operation to complete","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
